_description: webp icon CDN: normalized logo icons 1024×1024, .webp only, under webp/

single point of entry: this file
file_tree.repo.config.json: this file; full tree + cross-refs here only
file_tree.workflow.yaml: canonical baseline workflow: flow, normalized spec, hook allow/block; _workflow
file_tree.workflows/clip-queue.yaml: operation runbook for --clip-queue rerender tuning loop
file_tree.workflows/logo-fetch-phash-pipeline.yaml: planned domain-logo fetch + pHash clustering pipeline design
file_tree.image-formats.txt: extensions allowed for normalization; consumed by .hooks/pre-commit
file_tree.bin: all paths below; directed graph in top-level key "bin"
file_tree.bin/logo.sh: entrypoint only: file → WebP; dir → batch (GNU Parallel); --domain HOST → fetch (Google s2, site icons, Bing HTML) → phash-pick / prep / same render pipeline. CONFIG at top. See key "bin" for subprocess list.
file_tree.bin/get-bg-color.sh: subprocess: logo.sh (get_background) — edge/corner sampling → #HEX or OPAQUE
file_tree.bin/mask.png: data: logo.sh CONFIG MASK_FILE — mask alpha (else round-rect fallback)
file_tree.bin/logo-prep-logo.zsh: sourced: logo.sh --domain — fuzz-trim / content bounds before main (--no-domain-prep skips)
file_tree.bin/phash-pick.zsh: subprocess: logo.sh --domain — uses SCRIPT_DIR/.venv/bin/python3 or auto venv.zsh + bin/requirements.txt
file_tree.bin/venv.zsh: creates SCRIPT_DIR/.venv, pip install from SCRIPT_DIR/requirements.txt (or parent requirements.txt legacy)
file_tree.bin/requirements.txt: Pillow/imagehash/etc. for phash; copied with bin/ into $CURTOOLS; root requirements.txt → symlink to this file
file_tree.bin/sharpen.sh: standalone CLI: ImageMagick -sharpen — not invoked by logo.sh
file_tree.bin/svg2png.sh: standalone CLI: type-sniff → PNG — not invoked by logo.sh
file_tree.bin/colorpick.sh: standalone CLI: palette / pixel / average → hex — not invoked by logo.sh
file_tree.bin/git-webp-tighten.sh: standalone: git history rewrite for webp/ sliding window; reads bin/git-webp-tighten.config
file_tree.bin/check-repo-size.sh: standalone/hook utility: warns when git size-pack exceeds threshold; suggests git-webp-tighten.sh
file_tree.requirements.txt: symlink → bin/requirements.txt (pip -r from repo root still works)
file_tree..hooks/pre-commit: only staged under webp/; 1024×1024 .webp only; strip metadata; refs image-formats.txt
file_tree..hooks/pre-push: warn-only repo size monitor; runs bin/check-repo-size.sh
file_tree..hooks/scripts/setup.sh: one-time: git config include + chmod hooks
file_tree.git-template: stub hooks for git init; clone uses this
file_tree.data/domains.txt.example: example domain list for logo-fetch pipeline; copy to data/domains.txt

_manifest.docs: optional: docs/*.config.json for large tangents only; else self-document in scripts (inline) or workflow

invoked_or_sourced_by_logo.bin/get-bg-color.sh: external command: background color probe for opaque vs composited render
invoked_or_sourced_by_logo.bin/mask.png: read as raster mask path from CONFIG
invoked_or_sourced_by_logo.bin/logo-prep-logo.zsh: zsh source: post-fetch logo trim before main()
invoked_or_sourced_by_logo.bin/phash-pick.zsh: external command: --domain winner among Bing bins vs Google favicon anchor (Hamming + max-edge)

domain_phash_stack: bin/venv.zsh → SCRIPT_DIR/.venv (same dir as logo.sh, e.g. $CURTOOLS/.venv)
logo.sh auto-runs venv.zsh when .venv missing and Bing phash needed unless LOGO_AUTO_VENV=0
phash-pick.zsh prefers SCRIPT_DIR/.venv, else legacy parent .venv, else python3

deps: python3 — --domain Bing phash; deps installed into SCRIPT_DIR/.venv via bin/requirements.txt (auto or ./bin/venv.zsh)
add: ./bin/logo.sh <dir> --out-dir <dir> (recursive, preserves nested folders, skips existing outputs)
./bin/logo.sh --domain example.com [--logo-rip-only] (default out webp/example.webp from first hostname label)
repo_env: logo.sh: CONFIG in script. --domain phash: .venv next to logo.sh (repo bin/.venv or $CURTOOLS/logo/.venv); LOGO=checkout with webp/ when using namespaced tools; LOGO_AUTO_VENV=0 disables auto pip.

curtools_and_shell._model: Mirror repo bin/ → $CURTOOLS/logo/ (same filenames as bin/: logo.sh, mask.png, requirements.txt, *.zsh, …).
curtools_and_shell._repo_root: logo.sh sets REPO_ROOT from LOGO when LOGO/webp exists (so WebPs land in the git checkout, not under $CURTOOLS).
